location: Found on a broken wagon beside two corpses, surrounded by four hostile Jellyfish, directly north of the Foot of the Four Belfries Site of Grace in northwest Liurnia of the Lakes.

source.name: Corpse on wagon, north of Foot of the Four Belfries

tactics: The four Jellyfish guarding the wagon burst with a damaging AoE when killed at close range — don't stand next to one as it dies.
Pick the jellies off from range or one at a time rather than wading in as a group; they're slow but punishing together.
Despite good physical block, the shield's own description warns it offers essentially no protection against piercing/thrusting attacks — don't rely on it there.
lore: The translucent head of a spirit jellyfish — creatures often seen drifting above sacred ground across the Lands Between — used more or less as-is for a shield. Its gossamer flesh weighs almost nothing, but does little to stop anything sharp.

builds.name: Buff-and-block build
builds.why: Its innate Contagious Fury skill boosts all damage output for 30 seconds just by keeping the shield equipped, useful to pop before a boss fight.

builds.name: Lightweight turtle
builds.why: Tied for the lightest greatshield in the game at 8.0 weight, letting a STR/DEX build carry full block capability cheaply.
